_source: MrBeast team strategy (public interviews), Colin & Samir research, Charisma on Command analysis
_note: Long-tail video scripting data. Specific formulas with psychological mechanisms explained.

curiosity_gap.mechanism: Reveal partial information that creates desire to close the knowledge gap
curiosity_gap.template: [Fascinating fact or number] + [Why it matters to viewer] + [What they'll learn]
curiosity_gap.example: '$2.3 million in one year — and he started with $0. I'm going to show you exactly how he did it.'
curiosity_gap.psychological_basis: Loewenstein's information gap theory; incompleteness creates tension

pattern_interrupt.mechanism: Violate expected pattern to capture attention
pattern_interrupt.tiktok_version: First frame must be visually unusual; stops thumb scroll

problem_agitation.template: State problem → Agitate (show how bad it is) → Hint at solution
problem_agitation.example: 'If you're doing [common thing], you're losing money every single month. Most people don't realize this until it's too late. Today I'll show you the fix.'
problem_agitation.use_case: Finance, health, productivity content; targets existing pain

bold_claim_test.template: Make bold claim → immediately prove you can deliver → show glimpse of proof
bold_claim_test.example: 'I built a $10K/month passive income stream in 47 days. Here's the exact blueprint.' (show earnings screenshot in hook)
bold_claim_test.social_proof_boost: Any visual evidence (screenshot, before/after) in first 5 seconds massively increases retention

story_hook.example: 'In March 2024, I lost everything. My company, my savings, my reputation. This is how I rebuilt it — and why it made me stronger.'
story_hook.mechanism: Narrative transportation — people can't look away from stories mid-conflict

hook.purpose: State promise; establish why viewer should stay

credibility_bridge.purpose: Who you are; why listen to you

youtube_long_form.pattern_interrupts: Every 60-90 seconds: B-roll, graphics, clip change, music transition

call_to_action.content: Subscribe if this is useful; comment question

youtube_long_form.strong_ending: Callback to hook; summarize 3 key points; preview next video

content.pace: One new piece of information every 5-8 seconds

tiktok_short.no_slow_reveals: All information at consistent pace; never make viewer wait

tutorial_structure.intro: What you'll build/learn + who it's for (15-30s)
tutorial_structure.context: Why this matters; common mistake to avoid (60s)
tutorial_structure.step_by_step: Number each step; on-screen text for each; zoom in on key moments
tutorial_structure.mistakes_section: Common errors; prevents support questions; adds SEO long-tail
tutorial_structure.conclusion: Show final result; what to do next

open_loops.definition: Leave questions unanswered early; answer them later
open_loops.zeigarnik_effect: Unfinished tasks remembered better than completed ones
open_loops.implementation: Ask question at 2-min mark; answer at 8-min mark; hook viewer through middle

pace_variation.fast_vs_slow: Vary speaking pace; dramatic points slower; lists faster
pace_variation.b_roll_ratio: High-quality channels: 50-70% b-roll; talking head alone = lower retention
pace_variation.jump_cuts: Remove all 'um', 'uh', pauses >0.5s; rapid editing pace

reward_scheduling.near_win: Tease upcoming insight; 'In 3 minutes I'll show you the trick that changes everything'
reward_scheduling.chapter_markers: YouTube chapters improve navigation; don't just reward viewers for watching through

audience_interaction.comment_prompt: Ask specific answerable question; not 'what do you think?' but 'which tip surprised you most?'
audience_interaction.reply_to_comments: First 30 minutes of comments are weighted; reply fast to boost engagement

color_grading.skin_tones: Protect skin tones in selective hue; shift highlights toward warm (yellow-orange), shadows cool (blue-green)
color_grading.luts: Creative LUT on top of corrective grade; lower opacity (30-60%); don't cook the image
color_grading.vlog_look: Lifted blacks (not crushed); warm highlights; slight desaturation
color_grading.cinematic_look: Teal-orange split tone; slight vignette; film grain overlay

audio_for_video.voice_eq: High-pass 80Hz (remove rumble); cut 400-500Hz (reduce muddiness); boost 3kHz (clarity); gentle shelf 8kHz (air)
audio_for_video.room_treatment: Acoustic panels behind camera; moving blankets work; kill hard reflections
audio_for_video.microphone_hierarchy: Lav clip > Shotgun on boom > Built-in > Phone mic
audio_for_video.music_levels: Background music: -20 to -25dB under voice; swell during b-roll
